commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 2 Chronicles 31:5 And as soon as the commandment was spread abroad, the children of Israel brought in abundance the firstfruits of grain, wine, and oil, and honey, and of all the increase of the field; and the tithe of all things brought they in abundantly. None had kept the Phase this year. (Haydock) But those of Israel had not done it for a long time. (Grotius) Hebrew, "for they had not long before done according to the Scripture. "Septuagint, "the multitude had not done "(Calmet) Yet, even in the worst times, Tobias, (i. ) and other zealous souls, contrived to comply with their duty.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
